items.title: Is It Too Late To Consider McDonald's (MCD) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains
items.description: If you are wondering whether McDonald's current share price still makes sense for new money, it helps to step back and look at what the market might already be pricing in. The stock last closed at US$334.56, with returns of 2.1% over 7 days, 8.2% over 30 days, 10.3% year to date, 11.3% over 1 year, 35.4% over 3 years and 79.0% over 5 years. This gives useful context before comparing that price to any estimate of value. Recent headlines around McDonald's have focused on its global brand,...

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Sinks As EU Makes Trump Tariff Move; IBM Dives On This AI Threat (Live Coverage)
items.description: Indexes, including the Dow Jones industrials, dived on the stock market today. The EU made a Trump tariff move. Novo stock slid but gold plays shined.

items.title: Erste Group Sees McDonald’s (MCD) Benefiting from Strong Financial Profile
items.description: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is included among the 14 Best Low Volatility Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On February 18, Erste Group upgraded McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) to Buy from Hold, reflecting a more optimistic outlook for the company’s growth. The firm said it expects McDonald’s sales to grow “more strongly” in 2026 compared with 2025. The […]

items.title: The Stocks Unscathed by Today’s Selloff
items.description: The unlikely star of the stock market lately? Consumer staples stocks. The companies that sell groceries, cigarettes and household products were mostly unscathed by Monday’s selloff. Stocks like Mondelez International, the company behind Oreos and Ritz crackers, and toothpaste maker Colgate-Palmolive were among the top performers in the S&P 500.
